T0.1.name: Project Scaffold & Monorepo Setup
subtasks: Init monorepo: apps/mobile (RN), apps/api (NestJS), packages/shared-types
Configure TypeScript strict mode across all workspaces
Set up ESLint + Prettier with financial-code rules (no any, strict null)
Configure GitHub Actions CI: lint → test → build on every PR
Create .env.example with all required environment variables
acceptance_criteria: yarn workspaces install completes with zero errors
TypeScript compiles in all three packages
GitHub Actions pipeline runs green on a test commit
All env vars documented in .env.example

T0.2.name: MCP Server Setup
subtasks: Install FastMCP >= 2.12.3
Build and register prd_server.py
Build and register progress_server.py
Configure filesystem MCP server
Verify Google Search grounding
acceptance_criteria: gemini /mcp shows all 4 servers connected
Query 'what are the acceptance criteria for T0.4?' returns correct spec
Query 'what tasks are complete?' returns progress.txt data
Search grounding returns live Daraja API docs

T0.3.name: Design Token System
subtasks: Create packages/ui-tokens/tokens.ts with all colour, spacing, typography tokens
Generate React Native StyleSheet from tokens
Create component stubs for all 12 core components
Set up Storybook for React Native
Create dark and light themes
acceptance_criteria: All tokens defined and exported from packages/ui-tokens
No hex value or font size hard-coded anywhere in components
All 12 component stubs render without errors in Storybook
Dark/light theme switch works on all stubs

T0.4.name: Database Schema & Ledger Foundation
subtasks: Write PostgreSQL 16 migration: businesses, ledger, invoices, payments, vat_returns tables
Implement append-only constraint on ledger (DB trigger blocks UPDATE/DELETE)
Implement partitioning by business_id on ledger table
Write SHA-256 checksum chain function
Run migration, seed 5 test businesses
acceptance_criteria: Migration runs clean on fresh PostgreSQL 16 instance
UPDATE on ledger row throws constraint violation
DELETE on ledger row throws constraint violation
Insert of 1000 ledger rows for one business completes in under 200ms
Checksum chain verifies across all 1000 rows

T0.5.name: progress.txt + GEMINI.md Initialisation
subtasks: Create progress.txt with JSON schema
Create GEMINI.md master template
Write progress_server.py and register with Gemini CLI
Document session-start protocol in CONTRIBUTING.md
acceptance_criteria: progress.txt is valid JSON with all task IDs
progress_server returns current state when queried
GEMINI.md template covers all required fields
New developer can follow CONTRIBUTING.md and complete a session

T1.1.name: Onboarding Flow — All 4 Screens
subtasks: Build /onboard/type: 3 selection cards
Build /onboard/pin: KRA PIN input + real-time iTax validation
Build /onboard/mpesa: Paybill/Till input + Daraja validation
Build /onboard/kyc: Document camera + S3 upload with progress
Implement step-save: progress persists if user closes app mid-flow
Trigger GavaConnect eTIMS registration on KYC approval webhook
acceptance_criteria: Full onboarding flow completes in under 10 minutes on 3G simulation
Invalid KRA PIN shows error in under 3 seconds
Invalid Paybill shows error from Daraja in under 3 seconds
KYC document uploads with progress indicator
Closing and reopening app resumes at correct step
GavaConnect registration called on approval event

T1.2.name: Dashboard — Home Screen
subtasks: Build BalanceCard hero showing current month revenue
Build 4 MetricTiles: VAT Owed | Invoices Pending | Float Balance | TCC Status
Build ActionRow: New Invoice | Receive Payment | View Reports | AI Advisor
Implement SkeletonLoader for all cards
Implement offline mode with last-synced timestamp
Implement real-time float balance update via M-Pesa webhook
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard renders with skeleton loaders in under 500ms
All data loads within 3 seconds on 3G network throttle
Offline mode shows last-synced data with visible timestamp
Float balance updates within 10 seconds of simulated M-Pesa payment
No hard-coded values — all data from API

T1.3.name: Invoice Engine — List + Create + Detail
subtasks: Build /invoices: InvoiceCard list, FAB create button, filter bar
Build /invoices/new: multi-step form
Build product/service catalogue selector with VAT rate per item
Integrate GavaConnect: submit invoice, receive CU number
Build offline queue for GavaConnect unavailability
Build /invoices/:id: full detail, CU badge, share as PDF or WhatsApp
acceptance_criteria: Invoice created and CU number returned in under 8 seconds
CU badge appears on InvoiceCard after successful GavaConnect submission
Offline queue holds invoice when GavaConnect endpoint is mocked as down
Queued invoice submits within 60 seconds when endpoint restored
Invoice PDF generates and is shareable via WhatsApp
List filters correctly by status

T1.4.name: M-Pesa Payment Integration
subtasks: Build /payment/confirm: BottomSheet STK push initiation
Build /payment/status: animated success/fail screens
Implement Daraja STK Push with idempotency key
Implement webhook receiver: payment → ledger write → invoice reconciliation
Implement 90-second timeout resolution
Implement FCM push notification on payment confirmed
acceptance_criteria: STK push initiated within 2 seconds of tapping pay
Success animation plays within 10 seconds of M-Pesa confirmation
Payment automatically matched to correct invoice
Timeout resolution completes within 90 seconds without manual intervention
Ledger entry created atomically with payment confirmation
FCM push notification delivered within 10 seconds of confirmation

T1.5.name: TCC Status Screen
subtasks: Build /tcc: large StatusBadge, expiry date, validity countdown ring
Build TCC history timeline (last 12 months, colour-coded)
Implement daily GavaConnect TCC check (background job)
Implement expiry alert notifications: 60/30/14/7 days before, and on lapse
acceptance_criteria: TCC status displays correctly for compliant, warning, and lapsed states
Expiry countdown ring animates correctly
GavaConnect check runs daily and updates status
Notification fires when mock TCC set to expire in 7 days

T1.6.name: Admin Console — Core
subtasks: Build /admin: role-gated (RBAC), KYC queue with SLA countdown
Build KYC review: document viewer, approve/reject workflow
Build system health panel: GavaConnect status, M-Pesa webhook latency, AI API
Build business search: find any business by PIN or Paybill
acceptance_criteria: Admin route is inaccessible to non-admin users (returns 403)
KYC queue shows correct SLA countdown per application
Approve/reject flow triggers correct downstream actions
System health shows real-time status of all integrations
Business search returns result within 2 seconds

T2.1.name: VAT Filing — Overview + Return Detail
subtasks: Build /vat: ProgressRing, VAT owed, next deadline countdown
Build /vat/:period: full computation breakdown
Build approve + one-tap file CTA
Implement auto-submission fallback (48hr no-action)
Build offline queue for GavaConnect outage on filing deadline
Build peak mode: banner shown June 25–July 2
acceptance_criteria: VAT computation matches manually verified calculation for 5 test businesses
One-tap file submits to GavaConnect and returns acknowledgement number
Auto-submission fires after 48hr with no user action in test environment
Offline queue holds prepared return when GavaConnect mocked as unavailable
Peak mode banner visible on correct date range

T2.2.name: AI Business Advisor — Chat Screen
subtasks: Build /advisor: chat BottomSheet with suggested prompts
Implement 5-layer input sanitisation
Implement Claude API routing: Haiku for simple queries, Sonnet for tax analysis
Implement read-only context builder injecting ledger summary
Implement output scanner: flag phone numbers, account numbers, URLs
Build 'consult a qualified accountant' disclaimer on every response
acceptance_criteria: Query 'how much VAT do I owe?' returns correct figure from actual ledger data
Input with prompt injection attempt is sanitised
Output scanner flags a test response containing a phone number before delivery
Disclaimer appears on every response without exception
Response time under 8 seconds for Haiku-class queries on 4G

T2.3.name: Notification System — Full Tier
subtasks: Implement FCM push: payment confirmed, deadline reminder, TCC alert
Implement Africa's Talking SMS fallback
Implement WhatsApp business API: eTIMS receipts + TCC lapse only
Implement monthly cap: max 3 non-receipt WhatsApp messages per business
Build /settings/notifications: channel toggle, frequency preferences
acceptance_criteria: FCM notification delivered within 10 seconds of triggering event
SMS fires when user activity mock shows 8 days since last app open
WhatsApp cap blocks 4th non-receipt message in a calendar month
Notification preferences saved and respected across sessions

T2.4.name: Reports + Data Export
subtasks: Build monthly P&L report: auto-generated by 1st of each month
Build CSV and PDF export for all transaction history
Build accountant-ready report format
Implement 7-year retention enforcement (no delete on ledger exports)
acceptance_criteria: P&L report generates correctly for 3 test business profiles
CSV export contains all ledger fields with correct values
PDF is branded and passes visual QA
Attempting to delete a ledger export is blocked

T3.1.name: Payroll — Overview + Run Payroll
subtasks: Build /payroll: employee cards, total payroll cost, run payroll CTA
Build payroll computation engine: PAYE (all bands), NHIF, NSSF, NITA
Build /payroll/run: computation review, employee breakdown, M-Pesa batch confirm
Implement Daraja B2C bulk payment for salary disbursement
Generate payslip PDF per employee (WhatsApp delivery)
acceptance_criteria: PAYE computation matches ICPAK reference for 10 test employee profiles
NHIF and NSSF deductions correct at current statutory rates
M-Pesa B2C batch payment completes for 50 employees in under 10 minutes
Each employee receives WhatsApp payslip within 5 minutes of run completion

T3.2.name: Accountant Marketplace
subtasks: Build /accountants: search with filter (specialisation, language, rating)
Build /accountants/:id: profile, CPA-K verified badge, engage CTA
Implement ICPAK number verification flow
Implement consent-gated data access
Implement commission computation (25% first 12mo, 15% thereafter)
Build accountant dashboard: client list, returns due, commission earned
acceptance_criteria: Accountant search returns results filtered correctly by all parameters
CPA-K badge only appears after ICPAK verification completes
Accountant cannot access business data before consent granted
Commission computed correctly for a 12-month simulated engagement
Accountant dashboard shows accurate client list

T3.3.name: Bank Lending Referral — Loan Offers Screen
subtasks: Build eligibility assessment: 12-month check, TCC valid, VAT compliance
Build consent management UI: what is shared, revoke at any time
Build /bank/offers: Co-op branded loan offer card
Implement Co-op Bank API data share (consent-gated)
Implement referral fee tracking per approved loan
acceptance_criteria: Eligibility check correctly passes/fails 10 test business profiles
Data share blocked until explicit consent granted
Revoking consent removes business data from Co-op API within 30 seconds
Loan offer displays with correct personalised terms from Co-op API
Referral fee tracked in admin console per approved loan

T3.4.name: Pokea Risiti — WhatsApp Receipt Request
subtasks: Implement WhatsApp inbound message handler for receipt requests
Implement invoice matching engine (amount + date + Paybill fuzzy match)
Generate KRA receipt image with CU number and QR code
Deliver receipt to customer WhatsApp within 60 seconds
Notify business owner if no invoice match found
acceptance_criteria: Receipt request processed and delivered within 60 seconds of WhatsApp message
QR code on receipt links to correct KRA verification endpoint
Business owner notified within 30 seconds when no match found
Activity log shows all requests with match status
